messages.content: Pleasure to connect with you.I saw Avinash Singhania and Arun Dash as common friend and your profile seems credible from friend recommendations. I know them for 25 and 15 years respectively.Happy to talk with you as per your convinience. Pls feel free to contact me on 9886969451, Regards
